title: stipa lemmonii
intro: Stipa lemmonii, also known as Lemmon's wheat grass, is a perennial bunchgrass native to the southwestern United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues and skin irritations due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stipa lemmonii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used in traditional medicine.
